L2_brief: Penumbra provided preliminary unaudited Q4 2025 revenue of $383.0M–$384.8M, representing ~21.4%–22.0% year-over-year growth (~23.2%–23.8% excluding China). Full year 2025 revenue was $1,401.3M–$1,403.1M with ~17.3%–17.5% growth (~24.7%–24.9% excluding China), and operating margin of 13.3%–13.6%.

L3_detailed.event: Penumbra announced unaudited and preliminary financial results for Q4 and full year 2025.
key_figures: Q4 2025 income from operations: $56.9M–$60.4M, operating margin 14.8%–15.7%
FY 2025 income from operations: $186.9M–$190.4M, operating margin 13.3%–13.6%
L3_detailed.market_impact: Strong Q4 revenue growth of ~21%–22% and full year growth of ~17%–18% demonstrate continued momentum. Excluding China, growth rates were materially higher at ~24%–25% for the full year, indicating robust performance in ex-China markets. Operating margins expanded with Q4 operating margin reaching 14.8%–15.7%.
L3_detailed.forward_guidance: No formal forward guidance was provided in this preliminary update. Results are unaudited and preliminary.
risks_flagged: Results are unaudited and preliminary, subject to change
China region negatively impacted revenue growth rates, with ex-China growth approximately 7 percentage points higher than reported growth for FY 2025
